rules.rule: every responsive layout MUST declare parity across all RESPONSIVE_BREAKPOINTS for every block_id.
blocks present at desktop MUST be present (or have a reviewer-attributed responsive_omission) at mobile/tablet/print.
warning blocks MUST be visible at every breakpoint; responsive omission of warnings is FORBIDDEN.
broken responsive parity BLOCKS publication-ready transition (fail-closed).
render previews are deterministic snapshots of the responsive manifest; no probabilistic re-flow.
